ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the coding problem */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of solutions submitted */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the problem details */,
  "link" TEXT /* URL link to the problem statement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem */,
  "example_test_cases" TEXT /* JSON array of example test cases and their expected outputs */,
  "solution" TEXT /* JSON array of possible solutions (for reference or hints) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags (e.g., "recursion", "binary search") */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the problem was created */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the problem has been viewed */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of times the problem has been liked */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of times the problem has been disliked */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the problem belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Strings, Arrays, Dynamic Programming) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being worked on */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user's attempt (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time of the last submission made by the user */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has attempted the problem */,
  "last_submission_code" TEXT /* The code of the last submission */,
  "last_submission_result" TEXT /* The result of the last submission (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "last_submission_test_cases" TEXT /* JSON array of test cases and their results for the last submission */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the problem by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's personal website or blog */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* User's GitHub username */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity on the platform */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating or score based on performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the solution */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the solution is for */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the submission */,
  "submission_code" TEXT /* The code submitted by the user */,
  "submission_result" TEXT /* The result of the submission (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "test_cases" TEXT /* JSON array of test cases and their results for the submission */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the solution to execute */,
  "memory_used" INTEGER /* Memory used by the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the comment is related to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was posted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "replies" TEXT /* JSON array of reply comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the rating is for */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* The rating value (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
